context: Tests whether the agent uses SpecialCells(Type) to select blank cells rather than reading range values and filtering in Python, passes all required (non-optional) parameters to SpecialCells and RemoveDuplicates, and uses named constants for enum arguments. SpecialCells is the correct COM pattern for bulk cell-type selection; RemoveDuplicates is the correct COM pattern for deduplication.

checklist.name: SpecialCells used for blanks
checklist.description: Code calls SpecialCells to identify blank cells rather than reading range values into Python and iterating to find None/empty entries

checklist.name: SpecialCells called with Type
checklist.description: Code calls SpecialCells with at least one argument — the required Type parameter is provided (e.g., SpecialCells(c.xlCellTypeBlanks) not SpecialCells())

checklist.name: SpecialCells Type is a named constant
checklist.description: The Type argument to SpecialCells uses a win32com.client.constants.xl* named constant (e.g., c.xlCellTypeBlanks) rather than a bare integer

checklist.name: No Python iteration for blanks
checklist.description: Code does NOT iterate over range values (e.g. no 'for row in values' or 'for cell in row' pattern) to identify or fill blank cells

checklist.name: RemoveDuplicates called with Columns
checklist.description: Code calls RemoveDuplicates with at least one argument — the required Columns parameter is provided, specifying which columns define a duplicate

checklist.name: Columns covers both key fields
checklist.description: The Columns argument to RemoveDuplicates includes both column 1 and column 2 (e.g., [1, 2] or (1, 2)), matching the requirement that both fields together define a unique row

checklist.name: Header constant in RemoveDuplicates
checklist.description: If the Header argument to RemoveDuplicates is provided, it uses a named constant (e.g., c.xlYes) rather than a bare integer or boolean True/False

checklist.name: win32com.client.constants imported
checklist.description: Code imports win32com.client and sets up a constants accessor variable
